assertion_results.text: Output contains a kind:30020 event with d tag matching the auction id in content, and stall_id set to 'crypto-collectibles-stall'
assertion_results.evidence: kind:30020 present, d tag "trezor-auction" matches content id, but stall_id is MISSING from content — no stall reference

assertion_results.text: The auction content has starting_bid as an integer (500000), duration as 259200, and start_date as a Unix timestamp
assertion_results.evidence: starting_bid: 500000 (OK), duration: 259200 (OK), but start_date: "2025-01-15T00:00:00Z" is ISO 8601 string, NOT a Unix timestamp

assertion_results.text: Output contains a kind:1021 bid event where the content is the bid amount and tags include an e tag referencing the auction event ID
assertion_results.evidence: kind:1021 event with content "750000" and e tag present

assertion_results.text: The bid's e tag references an event ID (64-char hex or placeholder), NOT a product UUID or d-tag value
assertion_results.evidence: e tag value is "trezor-auction" which is the d-tag value, NOT an event ID (should be 64-char hex)

assertion_results.text: Output contains a kind:1022 bid confirmation with status 'accepted' and duration_extended set to 600 (10 minutes in seconds)
The accepted bid confirmation has two e tags: one for the bid event ID and one for the auction event ID
assertion_results.evidence: Accepted confirmation has only ONE e tag ["e","trezor-auction"], missing the bid event ID e tag

assertion_results.text: Output contains a kind:1022 event with status 'winner' for the winning bid
The winner confirmation also has two e tags referencing both the winning bid and the auction
assertion_results.evidence: Winner confirmation has only ONE e tag ["e","winning-bid-id"] — missing auction e tag, and value is not valid hex
